project.name: Oratile Coaching Website
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Editorial and elegant one-page coaching website with deep navy, warm gold accents, serif display type, line art, and grounded human warmth.
project.designRead: coaching brand site / leaders and professionals / editorial warmth / airy storytelling / avoid corporate tech slickness

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: Warm gold is the single accent hue for emphasis, rules, buttons, and italic highlights against deep navy and parchment neutrals.
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: Use deep navy as the grounding base and one premium gold family for identity. Avoid secondary brand hues and keep colour language restrained.
colorSystem.stateColors: Semantic states may be neutral-led only; no extra saturated systems are needed for this project.

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: Hairline rules, restrained 4/8/16px radius scale, circular halos, diamond markers, and thin editorial keylines.
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Fraunces-style serif for display and quotes, Source Sans 3 for body copy, italic gold accents for signature phrases, uppercase letterspaced eyebrow labels.
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: Generous vertical whitespace, narrow readable text columns, asymmetric editorial breathing room, and clean section pacing.
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: Magazine-like sections, timeline chapters, hairline card grid, underlined text links, and buttons that feel tailored rather than app-like.
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: Mostly flat surfaces with borders and soft glow only in the hero. Shadows remain subtle and never become the design language.
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: Use the uploaded portrait motion asset as a refined moving portrait and pair it with a custom gold line-art emblem. No stock photography.
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: Calm hover movement, subtle reveal choreography, and respectful reduced-motion fallbacks.

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Editorial premium coaching site using deep navy, warm gold, serif display typography, line-art symbolism, film-grain navy bands, and restrained motion.

pages.title: Home
pages.businessScenario: One-page website for a personal and leadership coaching practice in eMalahleni, Mpumalanga.
pages.visualNorthStar: A grounded editorial portrait of a coach whose authority feels humane, intelligent, and quietly premium.
pages.compositionPattern: Editorial split hero with narrative bands and gallery-like pacing
continuityAnchors: deep navy and warm gold palette
serif display typography with italic gold highlights

pages.title: Home - About Portrait
pages.businessScenario: Comparison version of the one-page coaching website with a still portrait added to the About Oratile section.
pages.visualNorthStar: Preserve the same editorial warmth while grounding the About section with a direct portrait that feels personal and trustworthy.
pages.compositionPattern: Editorial split hero with narrative bands and gallery-like pacing
continuityAnchors: deep navy and warm gold palette
serif display typography with italic gold highlights
qualityRisks: portrait framing in the about section
keeping the new image elegant on mobile

assets.semanticDescription: Animated portrait asset used as a refined moving portrait in the hero and about sections.
Still portrait of Oratile Mogajane for the About section of the updated comparison page.
Uploaded Oratile Coaching logo used in the site header.
